---
title: "Geographical Thought"
subtitle: "Evolution of geographic ideas from ancient civilizations to contemporary paradigms."
author: "Geography Team"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
---

{{< include geographical-thought/00-syllabus.md >}}

---

Welcome to the **Geographical Thought** module of Geography OpenCourseWare.

---

## Part A: Common Topics (NEP-2020 & UGC NET)

These topics are covered in both the NEP-2020 undergraduate syllabus and the UGC NET syllabus.

{{< include geographical-thought/01-ancient-medieval-geography.md >}}

{{< include geographical-thought/01b-transition-explorations.md >}}

{{< include geographical-thought/02-modern-geography-foundations.md >}}

{{< include geographical-thought/03-dualisms-and-dichotomies.md >}}

{{< include geographical-thought/04-paradigm-shifts-perspectives.md >}}

---

## Part C: UGC NET Specific Topics

These topics are part of the UGC NET syllabus only.

{{< include geographical-thought/05-geographic-schools.md >}}

{{< include geographical-thought/06-geographic-traditions.md >}}

{{< include geographical-thought/07-darwinian-impact.md >}}

{{< include geographical-thought/08-geography-in-india.md >}}

---

## Quick Reference

{{< include geographical-thought/09-quick-reference.md >}}

---
